trim: 2021 Ram 1500 Classic (previous DS generation) — all trims
transmission: Automatic; exact transmission variant pending verification

maintenance.service: Change engine oil and filter

interval.logic: Oil Life Monitor (OLM) based: no more than 10,000 miles (16,000 km), 12 months, or 350 hours of engine run time, whichever comes first. Monitor will illuminate based on operating conditions; service within next 500 miles (805 km).

maintenance.notes: OLM determines actual interval based on short trips, towing, temperature, etc. Fleet note: 350 hours is generally only a concern for fleet customers.

maintenance.service: Rotate tires at first sign of irregular wear

interval.logic: At every oil change interval; also when first irregular wear is noticed even if before OLM triggers.

maintenance.notes: Irregular wear prompt overrides strict mileage intervals.

maintenance.service: Inspect battery; clean and tighten terminals as required
maintenance.notes: Maintenance-free battery; no water addition required.

maintenance.service: Inspect CV/Universal joints
Inspect automatic transmission fluid (if equipped with dipstick)
maintenance.notes: Applies only to transmissions equipped with a dipstick.

maintenance.service: Inspect brake pads, shoes, rotors, drums, hoses and parking brake
Inspect engine cooling system protection and hoses
Inspect exhaust system
Inspect engine air cleaner filter; replace if necessary

interval.logic: At every oil change interval (replace if dusty/off-road conditions warrant)

maintenance.notes: More frequent replacement in extreme dusty conditions.

maintenance.service: Inspect and replace Evaporative System Fresh Air Filter as necessary

interval.logic: At every oil change interval; replace more frequently in extreme dusty conditions

maintenance.service: Lubricate door hinge roller pivot joints with white lithium grease
maintenance.notes: Apply white lithium grease to prevent premature wear.

maintenance.service: Check engine oil level

interval.logic: Once a month or before a long trip

maintenance.service: Check windshield washer fluid level

interval.logic: Once a month or before a long trip

maintenance.notes: Use washer solvent only; do not use radiator antifreeze.

maintenance.service: Check tire pressure and inspect for unusual wear or damage

interval.logic: Once a month or before a long trip; rotate at first sign of irregular wear

maintenance.service: Check coolant reservoir and brake master cylinder fluid levels

interval.logic: Once a month or before a long trip; fill as needed

maintenance.service: Check function of all interior and exterior lights

interval.logic: Once a month or before a long trip

maintenance.service: Inspect CV/Universal joints
Inspect front suspension, tie rod ends; replace if necessary
Inspect front and rear axle surfaces and gear oil level; change axle fluid for police/taxi/fleet/off-road/frequent trailer towing
maintenance.notes: Special condition: change axle fluid if vehicle used for police, taxi, fleet, off-road, or frequent trailer towing.

maintenance.service: Inspect brake linings; replace as necessary
Adjust parking brake as necessary
Inspect transfer case fluid
Inspect transfer case fluid and change for special conditions (police, taxi, fleet, or frequent trailer towing)

interval.logic: Every 60,000 miles or 72 months for special use; also at 120k/120 months

maintenance.notes: Change fluid for police, taxi, fleet, or frequent trailer towing applications.

maintenance.service: Change transfer case fluid
Replace cabin air filter
Replace engine air cleaner filter

interval.logic: Every 30,000 miles or 36 months (also 60k, 90k, 120k, 150k); more frequent in dusty/off-road conditions

maintenance.service: Replace spark plugs

interval.logic: 100,000 miles only (yearly intervals do not apply)

maintenance.service: Flush and replace engine coolant

interval.logic: Every 150,000 miles or 120 months (also 100,000 miles / 120 months). Whichever comes first.

maintenance.notes: Source states '10 years or 150,000 miles (240,000 km) whichever comes first.' First replacement at 100k/120 months if due.

maintenance.service: Inspect and replace PCV valve if necessary

applicability: 2WD and 4WD unless individually noted in source
Oil change interval driven by OLM; never exceed 10,000 miles, 12 months, or 350 hours
Automatic transmission fluid inspection only if dipstick-equipped
Door hinge lubrication applies twice yearly regardless of mileage
validation_flags: Primary source: 2021 Ram 1500 Classic Owner's Manual PDF (book pages 248-251 / PDF pages 250-253)
Maintenance schedule extracted using pdfplumber table and text extraction
Oil change interval governed by OLM; extracted max interval is 10,000 miles / 12 months / 350 hours
Spark plug replacement is mileage-based only (no yearly interval) per source footnote
Door hinge lubrication noted every 6 months from source NOTE on page 249
Axle fluid change for special conditions (police, taxi, fleet, off-road, frequent trailer towing) explicitly stated in source
Do not conflate with 2021 Ram 1500 DT (new generation) maintenance schedule
